title: swartzia costaricensis
intro: Swartzia costaricensis, also known as the Costa Rican Swartzia, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to Central America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its traditional use in folk medicine. The health benefits of Swartzia costaricensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Swartzia costaricensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential uses.
